metadata.changes:
Change 1: Replace:
  # Combine all subject clauses into one complex sentence
      if not sentences:
          return ""
      # Strip trailing periods and whitespace from each clause
      cleaned = [s.rstrip('.').strip() for s in sentences]
      if len(cleaned) == 1:
          return f"{cleaned[0]}."
      # Join clauses with commas and an Oxford‑style “and” before the last clause
      combined = ", ".join(cleaned[:-1]) + f", and {cleaned[-1]}."
      return combined
with:
  # Combine all subject clauses into one complex sentence
      if not sentences:
          return ""
      # Strip trailing periods and whitespace from each clause
      cleaned = [s.rstrip('.').strip() for s in sentences]
      # Capitalize the first clause
      if cleaned:
          cleaned[0] = cleaned[0][0].upper() + cleaned[0][1:]
      if len(cleaned) == 1:
          return f"{cleaned[0]}."
      # Join clauses with semicolons for better readability and an “and” before the last clause
      combined = "; ".join(cleaned[:-1]) + f"; and {cleaned[-1]}."
      return combined
